name: CreateFlagRequest
description: CreateFlagRequest schema from Amplitude Experiment Management API

key.description: The unique key for the flag.

name.description: The display name of the flag.

description.description: A description of the flag's purpose.

key.description: The unique key for the variant.

name.description: The display name of the variant.

payload.description: An optional JSON payload associated with the variant.

description.description: A description of what this variant does.

rolloutWeight.description: The rollout weight as a percentage (0-100) controlling traffic allocation to this variant.
